svg.text: Handoff 1: Python ModelServer → Rust QUIC server
Contains: context_id, numpy array of detections
(x_min, y_min, x_max, y_max, score, label) per bbox
Copies pickled response into Rust-owned Vec<u8>
ZMQ REP send "ack" — ModelServer can reuse SHM
QUIC server internal: queue and transmit
Server side: infinite BW allocation (no LP limiting)
Handoff 2: Rust QUIC client → Python Client
Pickled ModelServerResponse now in client SHM
ZMQ REP send "ACK" — Rust can reuse SHM
